title_guess: Oxford, Watlington, London (Finsbury Pk, London Show) & Sussex (Steyning, Littlehampton, Arundel, Chichester)

pages.text:
Gloucester–Hereford canal, lots of Navvies buried in the churchyard.
Ashperton tunnel unstable.
    We left early to get back to Sunday church at St. G.  Simon lost van key.

__Wednesday July 6th__
9.15. Simon, Finder & Eve drove to Charles' & Jenny's new house in Oxford, Frenchay Rd off Woodstock Rd.  A week ago he beat the nasty woman next door in planning permission for a window.  House full of workmen working on shell.  Rooms clear.  V. exciting.                                          Haypr
On to deliver lights Watlington & [?send] Hinley.
On to Peter & Nana's house at Finsbury Pk.
Our last visit before they move after July 19th.
We slept in van & had breakfast with Nana & Thomas.  Peter in Wales & SW with Conrad, Eleni & [?Satter]-in-law Chhatrapati.  Nana was doing a dance exhibition which we had to miss.  After watching a bit of Murray at Wimbledon we went to the Merchant Taylors, gorgeous, & had a BBQ in courtyard put on by [illegible].  We (Chad) had invited 3 designers.
